home.title: Launch Your Token
home.description: SoroPad is an open-source launchpad for deploying SEP-41 compliant tokens on Soroban — with vesting schedules, admin controls, and a real-time dashboard. No smart-contract code required.

deploy.title: One-Click Deploy
deploy.description: Fill a form, sign with Freighter, and your SEP-41 token is live on Soroban.

vesting.title: Vesting & Controls
vesting.description: Cliff + linear vesting per wallet. Mint, burn, and freeze with admin controls.

dashboard.title: Live Dashboard
dashboard.description: Supply metrics, holder table, vesting progress — all in real-time.

deploy.title: Deploy Your
deploy.description: Launch a production-ready SEP-41 token in minutes. Configure your metadata, supply, and governance, then deploy to the Stellar network.

metadata.title: Token Metadata
metadata.description: Define the basic identity of your token.

supply.title: Supply Configuration
supply.description: Set the initial and maximum supply for your token.

admin.title: Administration
admin.description: Specify the administrative address for this token.
admin.warning: The administrator has the authority to mint more tokens, change token metadata, and manage other administrative settings. Ensure you have access to this account.

review.title: Review & Deploy
review.description: Review your token configuration before deploying.

validation.initialSupplyMin: Initial supply must be at least 1
validation.maxSupplyMin: Max supply must be at least 1
validation.initialExceedsMax: Initial supply cannot exceed maximum supply

dashboard.title: Token Dashboard
dashboard.description: Enter a deployed token's contract ID to view supply metrics, holder distribution, and more.

errors.invalidFormat: Invalid contract ID format. Expected a 56-character Stellar address.

settings.title: Network Settings
settings.description: Configure custom Soroban RPC and Horizon URLs. Changes are saved to your browser and persist across sessions.

validation.invalidUrl: Enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL.
validation.unreachable: Could not reach this URL. Please check and try again.
